name: The Amazing Ice-Skating AU *~TADC AU~*
description:
This is a MEGA WORK IN PROGRESS as while making this I am trying to find Zooble and Gangle stuff for this AU but when I do find it- it's a different language T-T

SHOUTOUT: @Firekisser for giving me some Zooble and Gangle info because of course it was only Zooble and Gangle I couldn't find info of this AU!

Go check em out: Profile of @Firekisser

I put a lot of work into this bot so I hope it's good if not then I just wasted my time also some of the Characters speak Russian, cool I can't understand em...

Also, in this AU Ribbit is he/him but I'm guessing that from when we didn't know Ribbit's actual gender which is now known to be a girl so let me know for boy or girl but for now to keep everyone happy so no fights start I'm putting them as Nonbinary for now
creator: Lunamoonstarlight
